creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tested straight X11 forwarding with wireshark before I committed 3.0.  It worked for me, so I tend to believe it is your machine.  In order for this to work, you need to run ssh -Y.  ssh -X will not work with the necessary extensions required for QT.

I did:

ssh -Y my-machine
wireshark&

It took a minute or two, but it did launch.  All I get on stderr is:

libGL error: No matching fbConfigs or visuals found
libGL error: failed to load driver: swrast

I suspect any other issues are with your X config either on the client or server.
